provenance_note: Vectors marked cross-checked carry digests copied verbatim from the independently implemented Deln0r/willow-go corrected-WILLIAM3 commit (which itself embeds upstream bab_rs 0.8.0 william3vectors.txt). Vectors marked blessed-local were generated by the pinned bab_rs 0.8.1 and are drift tripwires only; they do not independently prove correctness.
